item.title: Verified destruction — clawhq destroy
steps: Create cmd/destroy.go with the destroy subcommand
Implement dry-run: list all local data, data requiring manual cleanup, backup/export status
Require deployment name typed out for confirmation
Implement destruction sequence: stop container -> remove volumes -> wipe workspace -> wipe config -> wipe secrets -> remove images -> remove networks -> remove firewall -> remove clawhq config
Generate signed destruction manifest with timestamps and verification hashes
Add --keep-export flag to preserve export bundle
acceptanceCriteria: `clawhq destroy --dry-run` shows exactly what will be destroyed
No backup/export prompts user to create one first
Deployment name must be typed for confirmation
Destruction manifest is generated with cryptographic proof
All data locations are cleaned including volumes, configs, secrets, images, networks
